bull.text: Revenue CAGR of 45.1% over the restated period, with revenue rising in 2/2 year-over-year steps
PAT CAGR of 140.2% over the restated period
Offer for sale accounts for ₹0 cr of the ₹890 cr total offer (0%) — the fresh issue of ₹890 cr goes entirely to the company rather than selling shareholders

bear.text: CFO/PAT ratio of just 0.17 in the latest year, with free cash flow turning negative (CFO ₹17cr − capex ₹25cr = FCF ₹-9cr)
Top customer concentration of 79% disclosed in the prospectus
1881 criminal proceeding(s) disclosed/outstanding against the company
